PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-03-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SANTOS-CUCALON, WYNNE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HORI, ROBIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANTOS-CUCALON, SAMANTHA $5,733.93 PRINCIPAL, $133.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,866.93, THE COURT IS ORDERING $1117.00 FOR MEDICAL EXPENSES, $239.62 FOR RENTAL CAR EXPENSE, 30 DAYS ADDITIONAL FOR LOSS OF USE FOR $798.60, $578.71 FOR LOSS OF EARNINGS, AND $3000.00 FOR PAIN AND SUFFERING.
